## Overview

Survey of attention mechanisms from Vaswani et al. to Flash Attention.

## Key Claims

- Scaled dot-product attention is the core building block of transformers.

## Evidence/Data

Experiments across model sizes from 125M to 175B parameters.

## Limitations

- Focused on NLP applications only.
